_meta.description: Charge atomic group update with all four v1 members. Represents the live wire shape as of MYR-40 (2026-04-22) wire wiring + MYR-41 (2026-04-25) DB persistence. chargeState is non-null; timeToFull is null (expected when chargeState is Disconnected — not charging). See edge-cases/snapshot.charging.json for a scenario with non-null timeToFull.
